title: epic: Toolbar, Column Management & Export
motion: Merge PR #30: epic: Toolbar, Column Management & Export

findings.description: aria-haspopup=dialog on columns button without role=dialog on dropdown
findings.fix: Added role=dialog aria-label=Column visibility to .dropdown div

findings.description: Double horizontal padding: .table-panel + .table-header both apply --sk-space-2xl, misaligning header text vs grid
findings.fix: Changed .table-header padding to 0; parent .table-panel provides horizontal padding

findings.description: Export button always enabled; silently does nothing when no table is selected
findings.fix: Added hasTable prop; export button disabled when !hasTable

findings.description: Ctrl+K blocked when search input focused — no non-destructive keyboard close from field
findings.fix: Added isSearchField check; Ctrl+K passes when target is the search input

findings.description: Show All button fires redundant persist when all columns already visible
Static aria-label on filter/columns buttons overrides dynamic badge count — AT users cannot hear active filter or hidden-column count
findings.fix: aria-label='Toggle filters' → aria-label={filterTitle}; aria-label='Manage columns' → aria-label={columnsTitle}

findings.description: type=search + custom X button renders two clear controls on Chrome/Safari simultaneously
findings.fix: Changed type='search' to type='text'; custom clear button is sole mechanism

findings.description: Export button disabled title says 'Export CSV' with no explanation why disabled
findings.fix: Derived title and aria-label from hasTable: 'Select a table to export' when !hasTable

findings.description: role="dialog" on ColumnDropdown without dialog keyboard contract — Disclosure trigger uses aria-expanded (Disclosure pattern) while container used role="dialog" (Dialog pattern); WAI-ARIA §6.6 MUST behaviors not implemented
findings.fix: Replaced role="dialog" with role="region"; Disclosure Button pattern now consistent end-to-end

findings.description: Search button static aria-label="Search" not updated when filter/columns were given dynamic labels in session 3
findings.fix: aria-label="Search" → aria-label={searchTitle}; searchTitle derived prop already existed

findings.description: aria-label on role-less <div class="tool-indicator"> is invisible to screen readers — lucide SVG children are aria-hidden by default, leaving AT with no way to read current sort state
findings.fix: Added role="img" to the sort indicator div; aria-label is now effective on a named graphic element

findings.description: Missing aria-controls on columns disclosure trigger — no programmatic link from trigger to ColumnDropdown region; AT users cannot jump directly from button to panel
findings.fix: Added id="columns-panel" to ColumnDropdown root and aria-controls="columns-panel" to trigger button

findings.description: searchTitle derived from searchActive (searchVisible || searchQuery.length > 0) rather than searchVisible — when bar is collapsed but search term is active, label says 'Close search' but clicking opens the bar
findings.fix: Changed derivation basis from searchActive to searchVisible; label now matches the action toggleSearch() will perform

findings.description: searchTitle in Toolbar.svelte derived from searchVisible which was never added as a prop — S6 fix changed the variable name in the derivation but did not wire searchVisible as a Toolbar prop; searchTitle permanently evaluated to 'Open search (Ctrl+K)' at runtime
findings.fix: Added searchVisible?: boolean = false to Toolbar props; passed searchVisible={searchVisible} from App.svelte; removed dead ::-webkit-search-cancel-button CSS (input is type=text not type=search)

merge_conditions: All 14 findings fixed across 7 sessions. svelte-check passes 0 errors 0 warnings.
